result.title: How AI Helps You Express Your Vibe | Made by Google Podcast S9E3
result.description:
Ever wondered what your favorite vacation photo sounds like? In this episode, we dive into how Lyria 3 AI helps you find your creative voice by transforming inside jokes, memories, and images into custom audio. #AI #Lyria3 #MadeByGoogle #TechPodcast 

01:37 – What is Lyria? Creative Expression for Everyone
09:41 – Lyria 3 Pro: Longer Tracks and Structural Control
13:52 – Multimodality: From Photos to Personalized Covers
18:51 – Expert Prompting Tips: The Four-Part Framework
